name: Amazon.com, Inc.
description: Amazon.com, Inc. ecosystem — suppliers, customers, partners, holdings, regulators, and macro risks.

nodes.name: Cisco Systems, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Cisco is a key infrastructure supplier to support Amazon's extensive data center operations.

nodes.name: FedEx Corporation
nodes.relationship: Amazon relies on FedEx for a portion of its package delivery services.

nodes.name: Whirlpool Corporation
nodes.relationship: Whirlpool provides appliances and kitchen equipment sold on Amazon's marketplace.

nodes.name: Whole Foods Market Inc.
nodes.relationship: Whole Foods is a subsidiary of Amazon and serves as a direct consumer-facing business channel.

nodes.name: Netflix, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Part of the 'AWS 100', Netflix utilizes Amazon Web Services for a significant portion of its cloud infrastructure.

nodes.name: IBM Corporation
nodes.relationship: IBM is a customer of Amazon's cloud services, particularly Amazon Web Services.

nodes.name: Google LLC
nodes.relationship: Amazon and Google have a partnership allowing customers to access YouTube through Amazon's Fire TV Stick.

nodes.name: Microsoft Corporation
nodes.relationship: Amazon's Alexa and Microsoft's Cortana have formed an integration partnership to enhance users' digital assistant experience.

nodes.name: Apple Inc.
nodes.relationship: Apple uses Amazon as a distribution channel for some of its products like Beats headphones.

nodes.name: Rakuten Group, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Rakuten has a strategic investment in Amazon and collaborates on e-commerce initiatives.

nodes.name: Uber Technologies, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Amazon holds a stake in Uber and they have multiple business dealings, like logistics and e-commerce.

nodes.name: Federal Trade Commission
nodes.relationship: Regulates anti-competitive behavior and helps shape Amazon's business practices.

nodes.name: State of California
nodes.relationship: Amazon's operations in California are affected by state tax laws and regulations.

nodes.name: Inflation
nodes.relationship: Inflation can impact consumer spending and thus Amazon's sales.

nodes.name: Global Supply Chain Disruptions
nodes.relationship: Affects Amazon's ability to fulfill orders and maintain inventory levels.
